zh.lifeSummary: 當John Griffin於大約1645年1月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其時，他的父親Humphrey Griffin41歲，母親Elizabeth29歲。他於1663年9月17日與Lydia Shatswell在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1688年3月27日在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾布拉德福德 布利亞爾 格洛德享年43歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾布拉德福德 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Griffin于大约1645年1月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲Humphrey Griffin41岁，母亲Elizabeth29岁。他于1663年9月17日与Lydia Shatswell在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1688年3月27日在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾布拉德福德 布利亞爾 格洛德享年43岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾布拉德福德 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: Earliest dated memorial predates year cemetery was established: Ellenor Newton Carleton BIRTH 24 Feb 1613, Hedon, East Riding of Yorkshire Unitary Authority, East Riding of Yorkshire, England DEATH 1649 (aged 35–36), Rowley, Essex County, Massachusetts, USA BURIAL Ancient Burying Ground, Bradford, Essex County, Massachusetts, USA MEMORIAL ID 153530846
historicEvents.urlTitle: Find A Grave - Ancient Burying Ground

historicEvents.description: The cemetery was established in 1665 by the early founders of Bradford, which was incorporated in 1672, and was annexed to Haverhill in the 19th century. It was the site of the town's first two colonial meeting houses (whose locations within the grounds are not known). Documented burials include four of the town's first five ministers, many of its early settlers, and war veterans from King Philip's War (1675–78) to the American Civil War (1861–65). The stone wall at the front was built as part of a Works Progress Administration project in the 1930s. The cemetery is now formally cared for by the city of Haverhill, although most of its maintenance is performed by volunteers.

en.lifeSummary: When John Griffin was born about 9 January 1645, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Humphrey Griffin, was 41 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 29. He married Lydia Shatswell on 17 September 1663, in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 27 March 1688, in Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 43, and was buried in Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Griffin est né environ 9 janvier 1645, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Humphrey Griffin, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lydia Shatswell le 17 septembre 1663, à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 27 mars 1688, à Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Griffin um 9. Januar 1645 in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey Griffin 41 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 29. Er hat am 17. September 1663 in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Lydia Shatswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 27. März 1688 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Griffin è nato il circa 9 gennaio 1645 nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Humphrey Griffin, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lydia Shatswell il 17 settembre 1663, nel Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 27 marzo 1688, nel Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Griffinが約1645年1月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Humphrey Griffinは41歳，母Elizabethは29歳であった。1663年9月17日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルでLydia Shatswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1688年3月27日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルブラドフォード ブリアル グロウンドで43歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルブラドフォード ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Griffin(이)가 대략 1645년 1월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Griffin(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1663년 9월 17일 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐에서 Lydia Shatswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1688년 3월 27일 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐 브래드퍼드 버이앨 그라운드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐 브래드퍼드 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Griffin nasceu aproximadamente 9 de janeiro de 1645, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Humphrey Griffin, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lydia Shatswell em 17 de setembro de 1663, em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 27 de março de 1688, em Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Bradford Burial Ground, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Griffin родился около 9 января 1645 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Humphrey Griffin было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Shatswell 17 сентября 1663 г. в местности хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 27 марта 1688 г. в местности брадфорд буряль гроунд, хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности брадфорд буряль гроунд, хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Lydia Shatswell el 17 de septiembre de 1663, en Haverhill, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas.
